ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the weather station */,
  "altitude" INTEGER /* Altitude of the weather station in meters */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the weather station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the weather station */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the weather station was installed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Operational status of the weather station */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the station */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last data update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather report */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather station */,
  "report_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the weather report */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Relative humidity percentage */,
  "pressure" REAL /* Atmospheric pressure in hPa */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Amount of precipitation in mm */,
  "visibility" REAL /* Horizontal visibility in meters */,
  "dew_point" REAL /* Dew point temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "weather_condition" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather condition */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed in km/h */,
  "wind_direction" INTEGER /* Reference to the wind direction */,
  "gusts" REAL /* Gusts in km/h */,
  "cloud_visibility" INTEGER /* Reference to the cloud visibility */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Flag indicating the quality of the data */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_reports_cloud_visibility FOREIGN KEY ("cloud_visibility") REFERENCES cloud_visibilities ("visibility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_reports_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_reports_wind_direction FOREIGN KEY ("wind_direction") REFERENCES wind_directions ("direction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_reports_weather_condition FOREIGN KEY ("weather_condition") REFERENCES weather_conditions ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather condition */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather condition */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the weather condition */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL to an icon representing the weather condition */,
  "severity_level" INTEGER /* Numeric value indicating the severity of the weather condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wind_directions" (
  "direction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wind direction */,
  "direction_name" TEXT /* Name of the wind direction (e.g., NNE, NNW) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the wind direction */,
  "angle" INTEGER /* Wind direction in degrees (0-360) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("direction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cloud_visibilities" (
  "visibility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cloud visibility */,
  "visibility_name" TEXT /* Name of the cloud visibility (e.g., 10.0 kmLow: scattered, None) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cloud visibility */,
  "ceiling_height" INTEGER /* Height of the cloud base in meters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visibility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., meteorologist, data analyst, admin) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed version of the user's password */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather report being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the report */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES weather_reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data version */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather report */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the report */,
  "version_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the version */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the version */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the version */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* User who approved the version (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES weather_reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecast_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecast model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the forecast model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the forecast model */,
  "api_endpoint" TEXT /* API endpoint to access the forecast model */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the model */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the model (e.g., active, inactive, deprecated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)
